_comment: Biome-aware target surface height (top of blend tree). lerp(blend_ero_hi, polar@180, w_polar). Each biome maps to its Y band; flat biomes (polar/tholin/barren) get gentle wobble, rugged ones (methane/cratered/cryo) get biome_height relief; adjacent bands blend over a narrow climate window (w_* ramps) = short talus transition. interpolated (NOT flat_cache/cache_2d): sampled at the 4-block noise-cell corners and trilinearly interpolated, so the surface RAMPS smoothly per block between cells instead of being held flat across each 4-block cell (flat_cache/cache_2d produced hard 4-block treads on every slope).
